title: The Dirty Stuff 3D Packages
description: A Resource Pack which adds 3D models to Packages when held in hand, on the ground or when in item frames. Looks the best when using Quark's Glass Item Frames. Works for both the official and the original version of TDS.
body:
A Resource Pack which adds 3D models to Packages when held in hand, on the ground or when in item frames (very useful if you want to stash them around your world). Looks the best when using Quark's Glass Item Frames. Their original 2D texture is still used inside inventories. Works for both the official and the original version of The Dirty Stuff.
### Make sure to download the right version!
